title: AssasinsMonarchs
description: A medieval factions plugin with unique races, custom abilities, and a dynamic crown system that lets players fight for leadership and control of their faction.
body:
🏰 **Assassin's Monarchs - Medieval Faction Warfare Plugin**
**What is this plugin?**
Assassin's Monarchs is an immersive medieval faction plugin where you choose a Race and Category to define your playstyle, then compete for power through strategic leadership and crown warfare!



# **🎭 Choose Your Race (14 Unique Races)**
**Each race has unique buffs, debuffs, and height modifiers:**

**Human** - Balanced, no special effects
**Elves** - Taller archers with extra hearts and bow damage
**Dwarfs** - Short miners with haste and fire resistance
**Orcs** - Never hungry warriors with melee damage boost
**Undead** - Night creatures that burn in sunlight but regenerate in darkness
**Skaven** - Fast, small rat-people with poison immunity
**Deamons** - Fire-immune nether dwellers with lava regeneration
**Dragonborn** - Massive tanks with extra hearts and strength
**Hobbit** - Tiny, fast, food-loving sneaks with luck
**Snakeskins** - Water-loving reptiles with aquatic buffs
**Goblin** - Small, speedy looters with emerald luck
**Avians** - Bird-people with temporary elytra and no fall damage
**Wizards** - Magic users with potion buffs but weak in armor
**Ents** - Giant tree-people with massive health and forest regeneration


## ** 🛡️ Choose Your Category (14 Playstyles)**
**Categories define your faction's specialty:**

**Raiding Party** - Melee damage and speed
**Assassin Guild** - Critical damage and stealth
**Cult/Mystic Order** - Potion and enchantment masters
**Merchant Consortium** - Looting and trading buffs
**Explorers/Nomads** - Speed and exploration
**Noble Houses** - Health and regeneration
**Military Orders** - Armor and defense
**Hunters/Rangers** - Bow damage and tracking
**Shadow/Special Ops** - Stealth and infiltration
**Farming Collective** - Food and saturation
**Artisan Crafters** - Tool durability and mining
**Naval Fleet** - Water breathing and swimming
**Mining Guild** - Underground mining specialists
**Monks** - Unarmed combat masters


###  **👑 The Crown System - Fight for Leadership!**
**How it works:**

Faction leaders wear a golden crown with **Strength II** and **Resistance I**
The crown has Curse of Binding - it cannot be removed!
If the leader dies, the crown drops and the faction loses its leader
Anyone can pick up the crown - even enemies!
If a non-leader holds it for 1 hour, they become the new leader
Factions without a leader suffer Hunger and Weakness effects

**Crown Mechanics:**

Crown is a Golden Helmet with special enchantments
Gives permanent Strength II and Resistance I
Tracks crown history (who created faction, transfers, thefts)
Auto-checks every 5 minutes for leaderless factions

**📜 Commands (Assumed from typical faction plugins)**
/faction create <name> - Create a faction
/faction disband - Disband your faction
/faction invite <player> - Invite a player
/faction join <faction> - Join a faction
/faction leave - Leave your faction
/faction chat - Toggle faction chat
/faction promote <player> - Promote to Captain
/faction demote <player> - Demote to Member


**⚔️ Strategy Tips**
Protect your leader - If they die, your crown is vulnerable!
Hunt enemy crowns - Steal leadership and weaken rival factions
Choose synergies - Combine race and category for maximum power (e.g., Elves + Hunters/Rangers)
Guard the crown - If your leader dies, race to recover it before enemies do!
Plan your build - Some races are tall (Ents 1.75x), some are tiny (Hobbit 0.75x)


**🎨 Features**
✅ 14 unique races with custom heights and abilities
✅ 14 categories with specialized buffs/debuffs
✅ Dynamic crown warfare system
✅ Faction roles (Leader, Captain, Member)
✅ Crown history tracking
✅ Automatic leadership transfer after 1 hour (If no leader has been elected)
✅ Faction chat system
✅ Color-coded faction names
✅ Persistent data storage


**
Will you rise as a monarch, or fall as an assassin? 👑⚔️**
